name: Callers of prisma include all known mutation files

gate.description: Callers of the prisma client should include packages/api-core/src/polls/mutations.ts and apps/api/src/routes/polls.ts. Without this, impact analysis of database changes is incomplete.

name: Semantic 'how is the poll route handler wired' ranks the route file first and the mutation second
query: how is the poll route handler wired into the api server and what mutation does it call

gate.description: Implementation-intent on a route handler should rank the route file first, the mutation file within top 3, and the database client within top 8 — without surfacing billing or unrelated UI files.

name: Callers of spaceApiKeyAuth include the polls route

gate.description: Real-world middleware-to-route analysis depends on the graph capturing every route that wires the middleware. The polls route imports spaceApiKeyAuth and must appear in callers/references.

name: find-symbol resolves a fully qualified symbol path even with re-export aliasing

gate.description: find-symbol for createPoll must rank the original declaration first, not a re-export aliased through @rallly/api-core, and must not surface the CreatePollParams type at rank 1.

name: References to prisma do NOT include billing files unless billing imports prisma

gate.description: References should be precise — billing files in the pinned slice do not import prisma directly. They must not leak into the top references list.
